allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.clockRecord.count\(\).then\(c => { console.log\(''clock_records count:'', c\); return p.worker.count\(\); }\).then\(c => { console.log\(''workers count:'', c\); return p.shift.count\(\); }\).then\(c => { console.log\(''shifts count:'', c\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
